description: Style NoteIf you want practical, durable and comfortable footwear, then these slip-ons from gliders are your best option. This versatile pair can be worn with a patterned shirt and corduroy trousers for brunch with friends or with a polo shirt and denims for a walk in the park. Product Details Round blunt toed brown slip on shoesSoft fabric upper, has reinforced overlay at the heel collar, elasticated gusset under the tongue and a decorative tape around the shoe and tongueMid foot strap adhered to the upper.Upper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with horizontal grooves, branding under the toe region and suction point at the heelComes with a shoe bagMaterial and CareFabricWipe with a clean damp cloth when required
